___auth_note___: Set IBMCLOUD_API_KEY env var in your shell or IDE before loading this config. The bridge reads the key from the Authorization header — it is never stored on the server.
___antigravity_ide___: Add the block below to your Antigravity mcp_config.json. Antigravity uses 'mcpServers' and 'serverUrl' (camelCase). Set IBMCLOUD_API_KEY in your shell environment.
___vs_code_mcp_json___: Add the block below to .vscode/mcp.json or ~/Library/Application Support/Code/User/mcp.json
___claude_desktop___: Add the block below to ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (macOS)
